hints.text: Vibe: often overcast, **open grasslands + gentle hills**, roads in worse condition than neighbours
Plates **plain white w/ black characters** (Argentina's have a black dot in the middle or a blue top bar)
Only **Gen3, black car, no antenna** (also AR/PE in S. America); camera often **smudgy** (rarer in Argentina)
**Thick white wooden signposts** with up to four rectangular notches at the back (also Bolivia)
**Triple road lines** = double yellow with white dashes between — a design not seen anywhere else in the Americas
**White bollards** (one side often painted yellow) + stone barriers — specific to Uruguay
**Trident poles** (3 upward-pointing insulators; also RS Brazil); plus round poles w/ flat-metal tops & square concrete poles
Guardrail support = 3 sides **+ corner bits of the 4th** (Argentina just 3 sides); green-painted **stone km marker** (unique)
Chevrons **yellow w/ black arrows** (Argentina uniquely = white w/ red); **reddish soil** common (a good clue vs Argentina)
Houses **cube-shaped concrete**, drab & weathered, flat roofs common; short stocky palms; **cattle everywhere** (≈4:1 vs people)
